I was traveling with family, which made the disruption harder to manage. I ended up paying for my own hotel and finding a backup flight myself.

review_title: Good updates during an otherwise stressful trip
review_text: This was still a disrupted JetBlue trip from ATL to BOS, but communication stood out in a good way. The airline used clear text alerts, staff repeated the same message at the gate, and the final rebooking instructions were easy to follow.

review_title: Bag never arrived when promised
review_text: My checked bag did not arrive after flying Southwest from PHX to ATL. The baggage desk opened a claim, but tracking updates were vague and phone support kept sending me back to the airport team. The luggage finally showed up 1 days later with no proactive communication.

review_title: Rebooking process was exhausting
review_text: After a disruption on Southwest from ATL to BOS, the rebooking process was the most frustrating part. I waited about 50 minutes in line, the kiosk could not confirm the new itinerary, and the app kept removing the seat it had just offered me.
